zh.Beauly, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾波奧利
zh.Liddell Castle, Liddesdale, Roxburghshir: 英國蘇格蘭希倫德利德斯達爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermengarde Durward於1233年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾霍其可時，她的父親Alan Durward39歲，母親Marjory of Scotland21歲。她於大約1246年與William de Soules III在英國蘇格蘭希倫德利德斯達爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Beauly, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰音巴內-爾波奧利
zh-hans.Liddell Castle, Liddesdale, Roxburghshir: 英国苏格兰希倫德利德斯達爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ermengarde Durward于1233年出生在苏格兰洛包爾霍其可时，她的父亲Alan Durward39岁，母亲Marjory of Scotland21岁。她于大约1246年与William de Soules III在英国苏格兰希倫德利德斯達爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Durward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dorward
meanings: English and Scottish (Angus and Fife): occupational name from Older Scots, Middle English dor(e)ward ‘doorkeeper, porter’ (Old English duru-weard). In medieval Scotland the office of the king's doorward, Hostiarius regis, was hereditary and of considerable honor. The specific surname still common around Arbroath is probably from the office of doorward of the Abbey. The 13th-century royal ushers or doorwards of Scotland were based at Lundie in Angus.

nameMeanings.name: Ermengarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermengarde Durward was born in 1233, in Hawick, Roxburghshire, Scotland, her father, Alan Durward, was 39 and her mother, Marjory of Scotland, was 21. She married William de Soules III about 1246, in Liddesdale, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermengarde Durward est née en 1233, à Hawick, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Alan Durward, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Marjory of Scotland, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé William de Soules III environ 1246, à Liddesdale, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ermengarde Durward 1233 in Hawick, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alan Durward 39 und ihre Mutter Marjory of Scotland 21. Sie hat um 1246 in Liddesdale, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom William de Soules III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde Durward è nata il nel 1233 nel Hawick, Roxburghshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alan Durward, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Marjory of Scotland, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato William de Soules III circa 1246, nel Liddesdale, Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermengarde Durwardが1233年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアハウィックで生まれた時，父Alan Durwardは39歳，母Marjory of Scotlandは21歳であった。約1246年にイギリススコットランドヒグhランドリッドエスダルでWilliam de Soules IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermengarde Durward(이)가 1233년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 호이크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alan Durward(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjory of Scotland(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1246년 영국 스코틀랜드 히랜드 리데즈데일에서 William de Soules III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengarde Durward nasceu em 1233, em Hawick, Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alan Durward, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Marjory of Scotland, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Soules III aproximadamente 1246, em Liddesdale, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermengarde Durward родилась в 1233 г. в местности хавикк, роксбургшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alan Durward было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory of Scotland, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Soules III около 1246 г. в местности лиддесдеил, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ermengarde Durward nació en 1233, en Hawick, Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Alan Durward, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Marjory of Scotland, tenía 21 años. Se casó con William de Soules III aproximadamente 1246, en Liddesdale, Highland, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
